title: Walle theme tokens (src/configs/theme.json)
description: Design tokens mapped to CSS custom properties. Every token is optional; missing tokens fall back to walle defaults. src/styles/global.css always wins. Mappings: palette.<n> → --walle-color-<n>, typography.fontFamilyBase → --walle-font-body, typography.fontFamilyHeading → --walle-font-heading, typography.fontFamilyMono → --walle-font-mono, spacing.<n> → --walle-space-<n>, radii.<n> → --walle-radius-<n>.

typography.description: Typography tokens. fontFamilyBase → --walle-font-body, fontFamilyHeading → --walle-font-heading, fontFamilyMono → --walle-font-mono, scale.<name> → --walle-font-size-<name>.
